## Summary

<!-- what and why -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes (ruff lint + format + pytest)
- [ ] New/changed code has tests
- [ ] Docs updated (README/ADR/conventions) if behavior/architecture changed
- [ ] ADR added for non-trivial architectural decisions
- [ ] Only OSS-licensed deps/models introduced; `docs/LICENSES.md` updated if needed
- [ ] Task plan updated (`scripts/mark_tasks.py`) for completed plan items
